mapper.select: SELECT EVENTNO AS eventno, TITLE AS title, TO_CHAR(START_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS startTime, TO_CHAR(END_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS endTime FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}

SELECT EVENTNO AS eventno, (SELECT TITLE FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}) AS title , ALARMNO AS alarmno, CLUSTERNO AS clusterno, TMP_CLUSTER_NO AS tmpClusterno, SYSNAME AS sysname , EQUIPTYPE AS equiptype, ALARMTIME AS alarmtime, RECEIVETIME AS receivetime, ALARMLOC AS alarmloc , ALARMMSG AS alarmmsg, UNIT AS unit , CASE WHEN ALARMLEVEL = '1' THEN 'CL' WHEN ALARMLEVEL = '3' THEN 'WN' WHEN ALARMLEVEL = '4' THEN 'MN' WHEN ALARMLEVEL = '5' THEN 'MJ' WHEN ALARMLEVEL = '7' THEN 'CR' END AS alarmlevel , CLEARTIME AS cleartime, PTPNAME AS ptpname, SLOT AS slot, PORT AS port FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_ALARM_CUR_MST WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}

SELECT EVENTNO AS eventno, (SELECT TITLE FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}) AS title, SYSNAME AS sysname, PORT AS port, UNIT AS unit, TMPER AS tmper , DIRECTION AS direction, RXCUR AS rxCur, RXMIN AS rxMin, RXMAX AS rxMax, RXAVE AS rxAve , TXCUR AS txCur, TXMIN AS txMin, TXMAX AS txMax, TXAVE AS txAve, OCRTIME AS ocrtime FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_AI_PERFORMACE_MST WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}

SELECT EVENTNO AS eventno, (SELECT TITLE FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}) AS title, LINK_ID AS linkId, SYSNAMEA AS sysnamea, PTPNAMEA_BAU AS ptpnameaBau, PTPNAMEA_PAU AS ptpnameaPau , SYSNAMEZ AS sysnamez, PTPNAMEZ_BAU AS ptpnamezBau, PTPNAMEZ_PAU AS ptpnamezPau FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_NNI_TOPOLOGY WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}

SELECT EVENTNO AS eventno, (SELECT TITLE FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}) AS title, LINK_ID AS linkId, SYSNAMEA AS sysnamea, SHELFA AS shelfa , PTPNAMEA AS ptpnamea , SYSNAMEZ AS sysnamez, SHELFZ AS shelfz, PTPNAMEZ AS ptpnamez FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_UNI_TOPOLOGY WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT (EVENTNO, TITLE ,START_TIME, END_TIME) SELECT #{eventno}, #{title}, #{startTime}::TIMESTAMP, #{endTime}::TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_ALARM_CUR_MST (EVENTNO, ALARMNO, CLUSTERNO, TMP_CLUSTER_NO, SYSNAME, EQUIPTYPE, ALARMTIME, RECEIVETIME, ALARMLOC, ALARMMSG, UNIT, ALARMLEVEL, CLEARTIME, PTPNAME, SLOT, PORT) SELECT DISTINCT #{eventno}, ALARMNO, CLUSTERNO, TMP_CLUSTER_NO, SYSNAME, EQUIPTYPE, ALARMTIME, RECEIVETIME, ALARMLOC, ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL, UNIT, ALARMLEVEL, CLEARTIME, PTPNAME, SLOT, PORT FROM RCA.TB_ALARM_CUR_MST WHERE RECEIVETIME BETWEEN #{startTime}::TIMESTAMP AND #{endTime}::TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_AI_PERFORMACE_MST (EVENTNO, SYSNAME, PORT, UNIT, TMPER, DIRECTION, RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE, TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME) SELECT DISTINCT #{eventno}, SYSNAME, PORT, UNIT, TMPER, DIRECTION, RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE, TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME FROM RCA.TB_AI_PERFORMACE_MST WHERE OCRTIME BETWEEN #{startTime}::TIMESTAMP AND #{endTime}::TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_NNI_TOPOLOGY (EVENTNO, LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, PTPNAMEA_BAU, PTPNAMEA_PAU, SYSNAMEZ, PTPNAMEZ_BAU, PTPNAMEZ_PAU) SELECT DISTINCT #{eventno}, LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, PTPNAMEA_BAU, PTPNAMEA_PAU, SYSNAMEZ, PTPNAMEZ_BAU, PTPNAMEZ_PAU FROM NIA.TB_TOPOLOGY

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_UNI_TOPOLOGY (EVENTNO, LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, SHELFA, PTPNAMEA, SYSNAMEZ, SHELFZ, PTPNAMEZ) SELECT DISTINCT #{eventno}, LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, SHELFA, PTPNAMEA, SYSNAMEZ, SHELFZ, PTPNAMEZ FROM NIA.TB_UNI_TOPOLOGY
